definition: ICT's simplified daily workflow — the Interbank Price Delivery Algorithm (IPDA) applied step by step with specific time filters. This is the master checklist that combines all ICT concepts into a single executable trading plan. Every trade should follow this sequence.

the_night_before.task_1: Mark NWOG/NDOG levels and their CE (50%) — these are the week/day's primary reference levels
the_night_before.task_2: Identify HTF bias on D1/H4 using market_structure and IPDA 20/40/60 day ranges
the_night_before.task_3: Map all unswept external liquidity (PDH/PDL, PWH/PWL, equal highs/lows) = DOL targets
the_night_before.task_4: Identify HTF PD arrays (OBs, FVGs, breakers) that price is approaching
the_night_before.task_5: Check seasonal_tendencies and quarterly_shifts for macro context
the_night_before.task_6: Note scheduled news events (NFP, CPI, FOMC) — avoid trading 30 min before/after

morning_of.task_1: Mark Asian session high/low — these will be swept during London/NY manipulation
morning_of.task_2: Confirm or update daily bias based on overnight price action
morning_of.task_3: Check SMT divergence with correlated pairs

step_1_bias.tools: market_structure (D1/H4), daily_bias checklist, NWOG position, IPDA range
step_1_bias.output: BULLISH, BEARISH, or NO TRADE (if conflicting)
step_1_bias.rule: If D1 bias conflicts with H4 bias, default to D1. If both conflict with NWOG position, NO TRADE.

step_2_DOL.action: Identify WHERE price needs to go
step_2_DOL.rule: DOL must be >= 2R from expected entry zone, otherwise insufficient reward

step_3_timing.action: Wait for the appropriate time window
step_3_timing.output: Active kill zone or Silver Bullet window confirmed
step_3_timing.rule: DO NOT TRADE outside kill zones. London: 02:00-05:00 ET. NY AM: 09:30-11:00 ET. NY PM: 14:00-15:00 ET.

step_4_manipulation.action: Identify the fake move (Judas swing / liquidity sweep)
step_4_manipulation.output: Liquidity sweep confirmed — the trap has been set
step_4_manipulation.rule: The sweep must take out a SIGNIFICANT level (PDH/PDL, Asian high/low, equal H/L). Minor sweeps don't count.

step_5_confirmation.output: Displacement candle + FVG + CHoCH or BOS in bias direction
step_5_confirmation.rule: All three must be present. Displacement alone is not enough — need structural shift.

step_6_entry.action: Enter at the optimal price within the confirmed zone
step_6_entry.output: Limit order at FVG CE or OB within OTE zone (0.618-0.786 fib)
step_6_entry.rule: Prefer CE of FVG within OB zone. If no OB, use FVG CE alone. Never market order.

step_7_management.action: Set SL, TP, and manage the trade
step_7_management.output: SL beyond step 4's sweep extreme. TP1 at nearest DOL. TP2 at secondary DOL.
step_7_management.rule: Partial 50% at TP1 → move SL to breakeven → trail remaining 50% toward TP2.

silver_bullet_variant.difference: Steps 3-6 are compressed into a single Silver Bullet window (60 min)
silver_bullet_variant.advantage: Faster execution, tighter SL, higher R:R
silver_bullet_variant.when_to_use: When you have clear daily bias and the Silver Bullet window is active

swing_variant.difference: Steps 1-2 use Weekly/Monthly timeframes. Entry on H4/Daily instead of M15.
swing_variant.advantage: Larger moves, fewer trades, less screen time
swing_variant.when_to_use: When quarterly_shifts or seasonal patterns provide strong macro bias

failure_modes.most_common_failure: Skipping step 4 (entering without confirmed liquidity sweep)
failure_modes.second_most_common: Wrong daily bias — counter-trend trading because HTF analysis was rushed
failure_modes.third_most_common: Entering at wrong time — outside kill zones or during news events
failure_modes.recovery: If a trade fails, DO NOT revenge trade. Wait for next valid kill zone with full sequence.

key_principle: This model works because it WAITS for all pieces across all layers. Every step filters out 30-50% of setups. By step 6, only 1-3% of all price action qualifies. That's the edge — extreme selectivity.

bridge_integration.checklist_mapping: Each step maps to a scoring component in the ICT pipeline
bridge_integration.grade_requirement: Full 7-step sequence completed = Grade A. Missing 1-2 steps = Grade B. Missing 3+ = Grade C/D.
bridge_integration.automation_note: Steps 1-3 are fully automated. Steps 4-5 are partially automated (sweep/displacement detection). Step 6 uses Claude for final decision.
